summary: Builds prompts for single-message summarization; defines system prompt templates and constructs user prompts with channel/source context
notes: Matches hint: 'prompt.go builds the LLM prompt from messages'. Defines two constants (singleMessageSystemPrompt, localModelPreamble) that serve as templates for LLM instructions. BuildSingleMessagePrompt validates message text is non-empty and formats a user prompt incorporating channelName, sourceType, and message.Text. Depends on boundary package storage.Message struct.
